body:
**INCONSISTENCY - Header/Footer integration:**
- features/page.tsx (T4) ✓ Has Header, Footer, BackgroundAnimation
- pricing/page.tsx (T5) ✗ MISSING Header, Footer, BackgroundAnimation
- page.tsx (T3) ✗ MISSING Header, Footer, BackgroundAnimation

Builder 2 integrated shared components in T4 but T3/T5 don't have them.

OPTIONS:
1. Add shared components to layout.tsx (recommended - DRY)
2. Add them to each page individually (current T4 approach)

Need consistent approach across all pages.
